title: cyperus tenuis var. capillaris
intro: Cyperus tenuis var. capillaris, also known as East Indian sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus tenuis var. capillaris include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin problems, among others. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its essential oil can be extracted for topical use.
